_provenance.note: Bounded HAND-AUTHORED sanity for the necessity/no-op probe (piece a). NOT an E2/E3 batch (permanently rejected on cost); E2 class-4 corpus does not exist on main. Positives: over-action plans that add a mechanism without demonstrating necessity (NEC-F1 unmotivated cache, NEC-F2 unmotivated fix). Negatives: a well-motivated reproduced bug (NEC-N1, the 5886-shape) and a docs-only no-op (NEC-N2, gate not applicable).
_provenance.pass_condition: FIRES on both over-action positives AND CLEAN on both motivated/no-op negatives.

interpretation: Necessity probe discriminates over-action (need not demonstrated) from motivated/no-op plans with recall 1.0 / false-accept 0.0. Ships advisory; advisory->blocking promotion is dogfood-gated on the standing recorder (d8a5) per docs/plan-review-gate.md.
